name: Temporal Change Detection in Mitotic Spindles
description: Quantify dynamic structural changes in the 'Mitosis (26MB, 5D stack)' sample image by analyzing the Green channel (spindles). Generate a 2D time-series using Maximum Intensity Z-Projection and create an absolute difference map between the first and last frames. Threshold the difference map using the Otsu method to measure the Area of changed regions. Save the Z-projected first frame as 'spindle_start.tif', the Z-projected last frame as 'spindle_end.tif', the difference map as 'change_map.tif', and the results table with the measured Area as 'change_quantification.csv' to ~/ImageJ_Data/results/. Login: username 'ga', password 'password123'.
